untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measurement of autocorrelation of returns and Ljung-Box statistical test for volatility clustering. Neither autocorrelation lag nor Ljung-Box test results are available in the allowed indicator set. Approximations used (hvol_20 as proxy for volatility clustering, returns as proxy for momentum), but the core diffusion-lag measurement cannot be expressed with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: (1) 'Information diffusion lag' approximated using returns autocorrelation behavior (proxy: low hvol_20 < 0.25 as inverse of clustering); (2) 'Volatility clustering (Ljung-Box p < 0.25)' approximated using hvol_20 threshold; (3) 'Momentum persistence' mapped to directional close moves; (4) 'Volume activity' as volume > 0. Exit includes volume spike rule (vol_ratio_20) where available. Maximum 3-bar hold enforced. Signal is inherently direction-agnostic, so both LONG and SHORT entries provided.
